notes: **Batch 6 hold-out case 2** — added 2026-05-08 to test hybrid-v2's 120k threshold WITHOUT retuning. Third v2 java-gradle case (after spring-boot-checkformat and gradle-projecthealth from Batch 5). primary_language=java; framework=generic (Hibernate's Gradle Test Executor wraps JUnit 5). signal_position=late (failure block at L45536-45543 of 46198, ~98%). log_size_bucket=large (46198 lines, just under the huge threshold of 50000). One test failure out of thousands; the assertion-failure shape is clean (`expected: <false> but was: <true>`) and the test+file+line are all named. Medium difficulty because the diagnoser must understand JPA/@Version semantics enough to articulate WHY the test's assertion is what it is — but the log itself is sufficient to identify the symptom. failure_category=test_assertion.
